change_summary: Per-tenant API-call metering that aggregates raw request events into billable units on a fixed window.
critical_invariants: Metering is idempotent: re-processing the same window never double-counts.
Billable units are derived deterministically from raw events; no floating drift across runs.
requirement_closure: Ticket ask: Aggregate per-tenant API calls into billable units (billing foundation).
Implemented: windowed aggregation keyed by tenant with idempotent upsert; deterministic rounding; unit tests cover idempotency and window boundaries.
Deferred to: invoice generation tracked by BILL-202
repo_gates: cd backend && npm run build [result=pass; attribution=clean] - tsc clean
cd backend && npm test -- metering [result=pass; attribution=clean] - 9 passed

self_review_cycles.findings: idempotent upsert keyed by (tenant, window); overlap test passes
aggregation scoped per tenant; crash mid-window is safely re-runnable
streamed aggregation, bounded memory; benchmark within budget
billable-unit contract stable for BILL-202; closeout complete
